results.competition: Rothesay 2nd Test, KIA Oval — New Zealand won by 253 runs (series level 1-1)

ticker: Hull City promoted to Premier League — McBurnie's 90+5 header seals 1-0 Championship Play-Off Final win over Middlesbrough at Wembley
Bolton Wanderers back in the Championship — Rodrigues brace and Dalby scissor kick deliver 4-1 League One Play-Off Final win over Stockport County
Notts County end 11-year League One exile — Jodi Jones magnificent as Magpies beat Salford City 3-0 in League Two Play-Off Final
England name 26-man World Cup 2026 squad — Harry Kane leads attack; Cole Palmer, Phil Foden and Trent Alexander-Arnold among notable omissions
Rothesay 2nd Test — New Zealand win by 253 runs at the KIA Oval; Matt Henry takes 11 for 109 in the match to level the series at 1-1
England recall Ben Stokes and Gus Atkinson for the 3rd Rothesay Test at Trent Bridge (26 Jun) after the ECB disciplinary hearing concludes
Middlesex 4th in County Championship Division 2 after six matches — Ryan Higgins leads with 28 wickets at 20.35 average
Rochdale promoted to the National League — Dieseruvwe's 97th-minute equaliser forces extra time before Rochdale win play-off final on penalties against Boreham Wood
FIFA World Cup 2026 — England top Group L after opening with a 4-2 win over Croatia; Ghana (23 Jun) and Panama (27 Jun) to come
Rothesay 3rd Test — England vs New Zealand, Trent Bridge, 26-30 June
